source_pr.title: binlog_test: fix sequence binlog test error in CI
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix `binlog_test` ci error
The link is [here](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/26057/pipeline)

### What is changed and how it works?
1: eliminate the domain reload
2: add wait time 

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Release note

 - fix binlog_test CI test error for sequence binlog.

symptoms: PR body: fix `binlog_test` CI error for sequence binlog; add wait time.
failure_signature: PR body: fix `binlog_test` CI error for sequence binlog; add wait time.
fix_pattern: binlog_test: fix sequence binlog test error in CI

evidence: evidence: PR body: fix `binlog_test` CI error for sequence binlog; add wait time.
evidence: diff increases `mustGetDDLBinlog` polling from 10 to 100 retries and resets pump payloads before running (sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go).
